TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Skaru, title = Skaru, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Skaru} }

S.FORM: = Skaru = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Skaru. 78 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 152 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 40% niqan 61 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 60% niqan 91 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 37%, Saysiyat 3%, Bunun 1%. Hangan alang (Skaru)alang Skaru. Tnteanak alang Hangan alang Kkaru nii o mniq kari Tayyal do "U-sing-s-su"ka dungus na, yasa sbiyaw do egu bi U-sing-s-su ka dxgal hini. Nniqan Sing-cu-seyn-u-fung-syang-taw-san-cun. Klbangan Quri dxgal Sing-cu-seyn-u-fung-syang-taw-san-cun 19 ling hini Kkaru ka dxgal hini msa ka seejiq Tayal, gaga mniq alang Cyng-ceyn hiya quri hunac daya yabi 4200m. Kndkilan lnglingay Mniq siyaw hraan hidaw hunac ka Men-two-yo-san Elug Cing-s o Hici bi kingal supu alang. Kklaan ppanan Mlutuc syusan Tey-c Mniq alang seejiq Tay-ya-cu. Jilan kari Kari Tay-ya kari Tlu kari Khilan. Snhiyaan utux Ci-tu-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Alang nii o quri Tay-ya-cu-Say-kaw-lye-cu-Ma-ka-na-ci-si-tung-ni s-cya-lu-Sijakaro uxay uri o sya-ke-lwo-cung msa. Sprun bnatasÔĻ§gaya Tay-ya-cuÔĻ•niÔĻ§qqtaan patas Kaw-sa-cuÔĻ•prajil o mniq Cen-si-paw bukuy do ini tuku ka qpahun qnpahan da, mnusa thjil mniq Cin-uey-san-lu ka seuxal han, bukuy do wada thjil mniq Syay-ke-lwo-si(sayang na alang Skaru), mnuda uuda Syay-ke-lwo-do, duma sejiq wada thjil Hey-ku, mniq alang Min-seng, hnici na seejiq do kika msupu alang Skaru kida. Kklaan rgrigan Qtaan bnatas patas Gaya Tay-ya-cu: Tnhjilan ni skrana alang bnnatas Lyaw-so-cn. Knlangan Sing-ung-cwan-ke-sapah paysan Kuan-kuang-suey-taw-ke.
S.PHON: = ska…ĺu = gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn u*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč ska…ĺu. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal **%, sajsijat *%, bunun *%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč (ska…ĺu)alaŇč ska…ĺu. tnt…ôanak alaŇč ńßaŇčan alaŇč kka…ĺu nii o mniq ka…ĺi tajjal do "u-siŇč-s-su"ka duŇčus na, jasa sbijaw do …ôgu bi u-siŇč-s-su ka dxgal ńßini. nniqan siŇč- ¶u-s…ôn-u-*uŇč-sjaŇč-taw-san- ¶un. klbaŇčan qu…ĺi dxgal siŇč- ¶u-s…ôn-u-*uŇč-sjaŇč-taw-san- ¶un ** liŇč ńßini kka…ĺu ka dxgal ńßini msa ka s…ô…ô…üiq tajal, gaga mniq alaŇč ¶jŇč- ¶…ôn ńßija qu…ĺi ńßuna ¶ daja jabi ****m. kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj mniq sijaw ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw ńßuna ¶ ka m…ôn-two-jo-san …ôlug ¶iŇč-s o ńßi ¶i bi kiŇčal supu alaŇč. kklaan ppanan mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ô- ¶ mniq alaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq taj-ja- ¶u. …üilan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi taj-ja ka…ĺi tlu ka…ĺi kńßilan. snńßijaan utux ¶i-tu- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč alaŇč nii o qu…ĺi taj-ja- ¶u-saj-kaw-lj…ô- ¶u-ma-ka-na- ¶i-si-tuŇč-ni s- ¶ja-lu-si…üaka…ĺo uxaj u…ĺi o sja-k…ô-lwo- ¶uŇč msa. sp…ĺun bnatas*gaja taj-ja- ¶u*ni*qqtaan patas kaw-sa- ¶u*p…ĺa…üil o mniq ¶…ôn-si-paw bukuj do ini tuku ka qpańßun qnpańßan da, mnusa tńß…üil mniq ¶in-u…ô-san-lu ka s…ôuxal ńßan, bukuj do wada tńß…üil mniq sjaj-k…ô-lwo-si(sajaŇč na alaŇč ska…ĺu), mnuda uuda sjaj-k…ô-lwo-do, duma s…ô…üiq wada tńß…üil ńß…ô-ku, mniq alaŇč min-s…ôŇč, ńßni ¶i na s…ô…ô…üiq do kika msupu alaŇč ska…ĺu kida. kklaan …ĺg…ĺigan qtaan bnatas patas gaja taj-ja- ¶u: tnńß…üilan ni sk…ĺana alaŇč bnnatas ljaw-so- ¶n. knlaŇčan siŇč-uŇč- ¶wan-k…ô-sapańß pajsan kuan-kuaŇč-su…ô-taw-k…ô.
S.FORM: = Skaru = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Skaru. 78 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 152 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 40% niqan 61 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 60% niqan 91 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 37%, Saysiyat 3%, Bunun 1%. Hangan alang (Skaru)alang Skaru. Tnteanak alang Hangan alang Kkaru nii o mniq kari Tayyal do "U-sing-s-su"ka dungus na, yasa sbiyaw do egu bi U-sing-s-su ka dxgal hini. Nniqan Sing-cu-seyn-u-fung-syang-taw-san-cun. Klbangan Quri dxgal Sing-cu-seyn-u-fung-syang-taw-san-cun 19 ling hini Kkaru ka dxgal hini msa ka seejiq Tayal, gaga mniq alang Cyng-ceyn hiya quri hunac daya yabi 4200m. Kndkilan lnglingay Mniq siyaw hraan hidaw hunac ka Men-two-yo-san Elug Cing-s o Hici bi kingal supu alang. Kklaan ppanan Mlutuc syusan Tey-c Mniq alang seejiq Tay-ya-cu. Jilan kari Kari Tay-ya kari Tlu kari Khilan. Snhiyaan utux Ci-tu-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Alang nii o quri Tay-ya-cu-Say-kaw-lye-cu-Ma-ka-na-ci-si-tung-ni s-cya-lu-Sijakaro uxay uri o sya-ke-lwo-cung msa. Sprun bnatasÔĻ§gaya Tay-ya-cuÔĻ•niÔĻ§qqtaan patas Kaw-sa-cuÔĻ•prajil o mniq Cen-si-paw bukuy do ini tuku ka qpahun qnpahan da, mnusa thjil mniq Cin-uey-san-lu ka seuxal han, bukuy do wada thjil mniq Syay-ke-lwo-si(sayang na alang Skaru), mnuda uuda Syay-ke-lwo-do, duma sejiq wada thjil Hey-ku, mniq alang Min-seng, hnici na seejiq do kika msupu alang Skaru kida. Kklaan rgrigan Qtaan bnatas patas Gaya Tay-ya-cu: Tnhjilan ni skrana alang bnnatas Lyaw-so-cn. Knlangan Sing-ung-cwan-ke-sapah paysan Kuan-kuang-suey-taw-ke.
S.PHON: = ska…ĺu = gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn u*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč ska…ĺu. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal **%, sajsijat *%, bunun *%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč (ska…ĺu)alaŇč ska…ĺu. tnt…ôanak alaŇč ńßaŇčan alaŇč kka…ĺu nii o mniq ka…ĺi tajjal do "u-siŇč-s-su"ka duŇčus na, jasa sbijaw do …ôgu bi u-siŇč-s-su ka dxgal ńßini. nniqan siŇč- ¶u-s…ôn-u-*uŇč-sjaŇč-taw-san- ¶un. klbaŇčan qu…ĺi dxgal siŇč- ¶u-s…ôn-u-*uŇč-sjaŇč-taw-san- ¶un ** liŇč ńßini kka…ĺu ka dxgal ńßini msa ka s…ô…ô…üiq tajal, gaga mniq alaŇč ¶jŇč- ¶…ôn ńßija qu…ĺi ńßuna ¶ daja jabi ****m. kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj mniq sijaw ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw ńßuna ¶ ka m…ôn-two-jo-san …ôlug ¶iŇč-s o ńßi ¶i bi kiŇčal supu alaŇč. kklaan ppanan mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ô- ¶ mniq alaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq taj-ja- ¶u. …üilan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi taj-ja ka…ĺi tlu ka…ĺi kńßilan. snńßijaan utux ¶i-tu- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč alaŇč nii o qu…ĺi taj-ja- ¶u-saj-kaw-lj…ô- ¶u-ma-ka-na- ¶i-si-tuŇč-ni s- ¶ja-lu-si…üaka…ĺo uxaj u…ĺi o sja-k…ô-lwo- ¶uŇč msa. sp…ĺun bnatas*gaja taj-ja- ¶u*ni*qqtaan patas kaw-sa- ¶u*p…ĺa…üil o mniq ¶…ôn-si-paw bukuj do ini tuku ka qpańßun qnpańßan da, mnusa tńß…üil mniq ¶in-u…ô-san-lu ka s…ôuxal ńßan, bukuj do wada tńß…üil mniq sjaj-k…ô-lwo-si(sajaŇč na alaŇč ska…ĺu), mnuda uuda sjaj-k…ô-lwo-do, duma s…ô…üiq wada tńß…üil ńß…ô-ku, mniq alaŇč min-s…ôŇč, ńßni ¶i na s…ô…ô…üiq do kika msupu alaŇč ska…ĺu kida. kklaan …ĺg…ĺigan qtaan bnatas patas gaja taj-ja- ¶u: tnńß…üilan ni sk…ĺana alaŇč bnnatas ljaw-so- ¶n. knlaŇčan siŇč-uŇč- ¶wan-k…ô-sapańß pajsan kuan-kuaŇč-su…ô-taw-k…ô.
